text_block_list.text:
A few days before the summer training 
camp…

text_block_list.name: TV Voiceover
text_block_list.text:
"Fans have been expressing their dejection 
after her long term medical leave since 
participating in the Satsuki Sho and 
the Derby —"

text_block_list.name: TV Voiceover
text_block_list.text:
"By no means however should you look down 
on her strength. I'm also looking forward to 
her performance at the Kikuka Sho —"

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Interacting with my destined connections, 
I thought something would change but ——

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
—One up! Golden Miso Special! Got 
some extra pork just for you!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Ohhhh!? Master, what's this all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
You're running in that Kikuka Sho arent'cha? 
Your Satsuki Sho run made me an instant 
fan! Do ya best, coz I'm cheering you on!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Haha, thanks a ton! I'll be digging in then. Be sure to keep watching alright.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
(Some things have changed, and other 
things haven't… It's only that —)

Then, the rays of the summer 
sun grew ever brighter —

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
—Gaining the stamina needed for the 
Kikuka Sho requires you to fine tune 
your mind and body.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Additionally, many girls shall rise in power 
this summer, making the battlefield hard 
to predict… To fit any situation, we shall 
be taking our training one step further.
choice_data_list: The support is truly appreciated, McQueen

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Enough of that, I dare say. I would appreciate 
it if you instead treated this as my return 
gift for showing me such a wonderful 
Satsuki Sho and Japan Derby.

text_block_list.name: $(scale 55)Elegant Chestnut-Haired Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Please leave it to myself to document 
the results of this summer camp. I will 
do my best to become someone Miss 
Stego may rely upon.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
You're a helpful one alright. Thanks to 
that, this is gonna turn out becoming a 
pretty heated-up summer.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Oh that's right, McQueen. 
What's Bright doing?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I believe Bright is diligently taking 
upon her training in her own way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
…That girl, something has slightly 
changed within her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I have always thought of her as a strong 
willed girl, yet lately, would it be more 
fitting to say that her resolve has 
become indomitable?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
…I believe that it may have possibly 
been your influence that caused this 
change within her.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
It'd be pretty interesting if that was the 
case… Well, let's put that conversation 
aside for now.
choice_data_list: Let's get even stronger this summer

text_block_list.text:
Ever since autumn, we have been enjoying 
our journeys to the fullest. All so that we 
can run for the Classic Triple Crown —

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: You're right. Let's aim for that.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
——So that we can brave whatever storm 
comes our way, right?
